title: Temporal Control Diffusion for Instruction-Guided Video Editing
summary: A diffusion-based video editing method that introduces explicit temporal consistency constraints for instruction-guided controllable video editing.

technical_signals.technical_core: A temporal control module regularizes frame-level diffusion edits with cross-frame constraints and evaluates identity, motion, and temporal consistency.

title: OpenVideoConsistencyBench
summary: An open-source benchmark toolkit for evaluating temporal consistency in video generation and controllable video editing models.

technical_signals.technical_core: The repo implements metric wrappers, dataset adapters, leaderboard export, and failure-case visualization for video temporal consistency.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Scientific Writing Agents with Citation-Aware Planning
summary: A multi-agent academic writing system that plans sections, retrieves evidence, and verifies citation grounding for paper drafting workflows.

technical_signals.technical_core: The system decomposes writing into outline planning, retrieval, drafting, and citation verification agents.

title: AI Drawing Model Evaluation Report: Prompt Fidelity, Layout, and Editability
summary: A technical report comparing AI drawing systems on prompt fidelity, layout control, local editing, and repeatability across real design tasks.

technical_signals.technical_core: The report uses task-level evaluation rubrics for image generation quality, controllability, and editability.

title: VidEditFlow
summary: A modular inference pipeline for controllable video editing with adapters for text instructions, masks, and reference frames.

technical_signals.technical_core: The core pipeline separates instruction parsing, frame conditioning, diffusion inference, and temporal smoothing.

title: Controllable Video Editing Benchmark 2026
summary: A benchmark suite for instruction following, object preservation, local edit accuracy, and temporal consistency in video editing.

technical_signals.technical_core: The benchmark separates instruction compliance, spatial locality, identity preservation, and temporal consistency.

title: Why Video Generation Research Is Moving Toward Controllable Editing
summary: A source-cited technical article arguing that recent video generation work is shifting from pure text-to-video to controllable video editing and evaluation.

technical_signals.technical_core: The article compares task definitions, benchmark pressure, and failure modes across recent video generation systems.

title: Academic LLM Workbench Capability Notes
summary: A practical comparison of academic writing tools on literature review, citation checking, outline planning, and revision support.

technical_signals.technical_core: The notes compare evidence retrieval, citation grounding, draft revision, and formatting reliability.

title: Video AI Super Prompt Collection
summary: A large prompt collection for video generation tools with little implementation detail or evaluation.

technical_signals.technical_core: Prompt examples without implementation, evaluation, or method details.

title: A Short Note on Better Text-to-Video Prompts
summary: A short paper claiming improved video generation quality through prompt wording, without controlled experiments or strong baselines.

technical_signals.technical_core: Prompt wording examples without rigorous evaluation.

title: The Only AI Video Editing Tool You Need This Year
summary: A promotional article about an AI video editing product with limited method details, no benchmark, and no reproducible examples.

technical_signals.technical_core: Product claims without technical or reproducibility evidence.

title: OldGANVideo
summary: An older GAN-based video generation project with limited maintenance and outdated dependencies.

technical_signals.technical_core: Legacy GAN inference and training scripts with outdated dependency pins.
